name: gorilla-mcp
description: The one-stop social media search engine for your agent. Search Reddit, X, Threads, LinkedIn, YouTube, and the open web from one tool call.
long_description:
Model Context Protocol server for [Gorilla](https://usegorilla.app). One tool call, six platforms — Reddit, X, Threads, LinkedIn, YouTube, and the open web. Results ranked Hot / Warm / Cold by topic relevance + recency + engagement, billed per result.

## Tools

- `search` — multi-source search via `/v2-search-stream`. Returns scored posts (Hot / Warm / Cold).
- `get_search` — recover the state of any search by `search_id`.
- `billing_status` — check plan + credit balance.

## Pricing

Per result, no caps. Failed searches fully refunded.

- 🔥 Hot (≥0.7) — $0.10
- 🟡 Warm (0.4–0.7) — $0.03
- ❄️ Cold (<0.4) — $0.003

Free tier: 1,000 credits / week. Monthly: $14.99 → 20,000 credits. One-time pack: $5 → 5,000 credits.

Get your API key at [platform.usegorilla.app/api-keys/](https://platform.usegorilla.app/api-keys/).

tools.name: search
tools.description: The one-stop social media search engine. Searches across every supported platform (Reddit, X, Threads, LinkedIn, YouTube, web) for posts related to the query. Returns ranked Hot / Warm / Cold results by topic relevance + recency + engagement. Filter by source and by time. Pricing: $0.10 per Hot (score ≥ 0.7), $0.03 per Warm (0.4–0.7), $0.003 per Cold (<0.4). No caps. Failed searches fully refunded.

query.description: What to search for, in your own words. Sent verbatim to each requested source.

source.description: Which platform to search. Default 'all' searches every source in parallel.

since.description: Time range. Tokens: '24h' | '7d' | '30d' | '180d' | '6mo' | 'all'. Or an ISO date.

tools.name: get_search
tools.description: Fetch the current state + results for a search by its search_id. Use this to recover a search that timed out client-side, or to re-read a recent one. Free.

search_id.description: The search_id returned by a prior search call.

tools.name: billing_status
tools.description: Check plan and credit balance. Free.

api_key.title: Gorilla API Key
api_key.description: Your API key from platform.usegorilla.app/api-keys/ (starts with grla_). The server starts without it so MCP clients can browse tools, but every tool call requires a key.

config_url.title: Custom config URL (advanced)
config_url.description: Override the runtime config endpoint. Leave blank for the default (https://platform.usegorilla.app/mcp-config.json). Useful for staging or self-hosted deployments.
